ivable , Executable , Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor public class StringFunction extends Transformer Produce the output string generated by applying a user-specified string function

d by applying a user-specified string function on a provided input string. The available string functions are a case sensitive subset of the java.lang.String functions. trim : Remove leading and trailing whitespace from a string. toUpperCas

and trailing whitespace from a string. toUpperCase : Convert all letters in a string to uppercase. toLowerCase : Convert all letters in a string to lowercase. Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Version: $Id: StringFunction.java,v 1.12 2004/04/13 03:10:13 cxh Exp

tail function public Parameter function Parameter that stores the string function to be performed on the input string. The possible values are "trim" (the default), "toUpperCase", or "toLowerCase". Constructor Detail StringFunction public StringFu

on Construct an actor with the given container and name. Invoke the base class constructor and create the input and output ports. Set the default string function to "trim". Parameters: container - The container. name - The name of this actor. T
